summary: Bug fix verified: Login redirect to dashboard now works correctly. Tested all auth flows - login, logout, protected routes, error handling. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 with token and user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password returns 401 'Credenciais inválidas'
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with non-existent email returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with missing fields returns 422
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user info
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with invalid token returns 401
Frontend: Login page displays correctly with email/password fields and data-testid attributes
Frontend: Login with valid credentials (admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026!) redirects to /dashboard - BUG FIX VERIFIED
Frontend: Success toast 'Login realizado com sucesso!' appears after login
Frontend: User name 'Claudio Gabilan' appears in dashboard header after login
Frontend: Login with wrong credentials shows error toast 'Credenciais inválidas'
Frontend: User stays on login page after failed login attempt
Frontend: Logout via user menu redirects back to /login
Frontend: Protected route /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.js: handleLogin correctly uses navigate('/dashboard', { replace: true }) instead of window.location.href - this was the bug fix
AuthContext.js: skipNextCheckRef prevents race condition where checkAuth would reset user state after manual login
AuthContext.js: login() sets skipNextCheckRef.current = true before setToken to ensure checkAuth skips on next render
ProtectedRoute.js: Correctly checks user auth state and redirects to /login when not authenticated
auth.py: POST /auth/login returns proper token and user data structure
auth.py: GET /auth/me correctly validates JWT token and returns user info

bug_fix_verification.issue: Login success message appears but app does not redirect to dashboard
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: window.location.href = '/dashboard' caused full page reload which triggered checkAuth before user state was set
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: 1) Replaced window.location.href with React Router navigate() in LoginPage.js, 2) Added skipNextCheckRef in AuthContext.js to prevent checkAuth from resetting user state after manual login
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Login now correctly redirects to /dashboard

context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth login bug fix verified. All auth flows working: login redirects to dashboard, logout redirects to login, protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to login, error messages display correctly. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_login.py covers all auth endpoints.
